name: Pork with Stuffing and Salsa
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces cornbread stuffing mix (range-top), with seasoning packet
1/2 cup bottled green salsa or red salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 1 teaspoon oil in a large nonstick skillet over Medium-High heat.
2. Add zucchini and stir-fry for 2 minutes or until crisp-tender. Remove to a serving platter.
3. Pour 2 2/3 cups water into the skillet. Bring to a boil, stir in the contents of the stuffing seasoning packet, cover, reduce heat and simmer 3 minutes. Stir in stuffing crumbs, remove from heat and let stand for 3 minutes. Stir in zucchini, then arrange on serving platter. Cover loosely with foil to keep warm.
4. Wipe skillet with a paper towel. Add 1 teaspoon oil and heat over Medium-High heat.
5. Add half the pork and sauté for 30 seconds per side until lightly browned. Repeat with remaining oil and pork.
6. Place cutlets on stuffing; spoon salsa on top.
Serves 4
Per serving: 379 calories, 29 g protein, 38 g carbohydrates, 11 g fat, 77 mg cholesterol, 1,122 mg sodium.
Exchanges: 2 starch, 1 1/2 vegetable, 3 lean meat
